title: Jaytrixia - Videos
description:
✨ Hi! 80% of the videos on this channel are all about my gacha pulls. Whether I lose the 50/50 or hit hard pity, I still post it all!
✨ Also, about 80% of my gacha games are F2P. The others are paid, but only for the monthly pass (Genshin, HSR) and one battle pass (Wuwa).
✨ If you enjoy gacha content, please subscribe to my channel. Sankyuu~ 

▶️ 1st YT: Dalmanski GD
🔗 https://www.youtube.com/@dalmanskigd

▶️ My Games ID is on this website I created.
ⓘ I created my own Jaymantrix AI, start chatting with me (With limits due to Free Tier):
